title: ASICs
description: ASICs are application-specific chips built for Bitcoin's SHA-256 Proof of Work. They dramatically increase hashing efficiency versus general-purpose hardware, reshaping mining economics and decentralization tradeoffs.

resources.title: Application-specific Integrated Circuit
resources.notes: General concept and design constraints for specialized chips.

resources.notes: Curated references on miner hardware and industry structure.
